title: asterocephalus rupestris
intro: Asterocephalus rupestris, also known as the rock-lobelia or mountain lobelia, is a flowering plant species found in the mountainous regions of Africa and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Asterocephalus rupestris are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
